inspiration: Modern flat vector game UI art
scene: A dark, muted {{grid_material}} surface filling the entire 3:4 portrait canvas edge-to-edge, serving as a non-intrusive game board background with very faint {{theme_name}}-themed motifs barely visible at low opacity.

subjects.description: dark muted {{grid_material}} base with extremely subtle tonal shifts and faint distressed grunge overlay
subjects.interaction: foundation for colorful gameplay blocks placed above

style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, 2-3 tonal steps, graphic cartoon game art
lighting: soft ambient top-down lighting with 2-3 flat cel-shaded tonal steps, no realistic highlights

background.details: flat dark {{grid_material}} surface with faint distressed grunge overlay; very subtle {{theme_name}} motifs ({{motifs_short}}) embossed at extremely low opacity; no grid lines, no high-contrast marks

composition: evenly distributed tonal variation across full canvas, no focal points, designed to not draw attention from foreground gameplay
medium: digital vector illustration with subtle rasterized grunge overlay
details: fills entire canvas edge-to-edge with no empty space
dark base color {{bg_color}} covering 90% of surface
faint cultural motifs only — must not interfere with gameplay readability
no grid lines, no text, no logos, no UI elements
usage_notes: This is a base layer only. Foreground blocks use brighter, higher-contrast colors. Do not increase texture contrast. Maintain flat vector readability. Avoid photorealistic rendering or 3D lighting.
